findings.issue: Landing page conversion is not optimized as the sample AURA profile is not visible without login
findings.recommended_fix: Implement a guest mode or a public sample profile to improve conversion rates

findings.issue: Share mechanics to LinkedIn/Instagram are not implemented
findings.recommended_fix: Develop and integrate share buttons for LinkedIn and Instagram

findings.issue: Referral system is mentioned but details are not provided
findings.recommended_fix: Clarify the referral system mechanics and rewards in the documentation

findings.issue: SEO meta tags are not set
findings.recommended_fix: Set relevant meta tags for search engine optimization

findings.issue: AZ-specific channels (Telegram groups, Instagram reels, YouTube shorts) are not utilized
findings.recommended_fix: Create and promote content on these AZ-specific channels

findings.issue: First 100 users plan is not detailed
findings.recommended_fix: Develop a plan to acquire the first 100 users, including outreach and engagement strategies
